_comment: Source-of-truth registry for DESIGN CONTRACT numbers (caps, SLOs, budgets) that appear verbatim in prose. sync-stats.sh computes each value from the live repo and replaces the inner text of <!-- stat:NAME --> blocks. Vanity counts ('how many sections this script has', 'how many rules exist') do NOT belong here — for those, rewrite the prose to omit the number. See digital-clone-research.md §三 for the registration gate.

zwbrain.legacy-subsystems.description: zw-brain: Number of legacy '一体化大数据平台' subsystems (source: old/integrated-bigdata-platform/README.md, .gitignore'd in zw-brain repo so guarded).

zwbrain.kept-functions.description: zw-brain: Number of K-rows (must-keep functions) in design baseline §3.1 table.
zwbrain.kept-functions.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^### 3\.1 /{flag=1; next} /^### 3\.[2-9]/{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| K[0-9]+' || true

zwbrain.not-doing.description: zw-brain: Number of N-rows (won't-do items) in design baseline §3.4 table.
zwbrain.not-doing.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^### 3\.4 /{flag=1; next} /^### |^## /{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| N[0-9]+' || true

zwbrain.webui-pages-cap.description: zw-brain: WebUI core scenario page count cap (§7.3 table data rows).
zwbrain.webui-pages-cap.compute: [ -f docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md ] && awk '/^### 7\.3 /{flag=1; next} /^### |^## /{flag=0} flag' docs/approved/zw-brain-architecture.md | grep -cE '^\| [0-9]+ ' || true

zwbrain.preflight-sections.description: zw-brain: Project-local scripts/preflight.sh adds N project-specific sections on top of the dev-rules template (counts run_check invocations).

zwbrain.prototype-pages.description: zw-brain: GATE-1 clickable prototype SPA route count (counts ROUTES entries in prototype/ui/js/app.js).
zwbrain.prototype-pages.compute: [ -f prototype/ui/js/app.js ] && awk '/const ROUTES = \[/{flag=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\];/{flag=0} flag' prototype/ui/js/app.js | grep -cE '^[[:space:]]*\{ test:' || true

zwbrain.prototype-storyboards.description: zw-brain: GATE-1 prototype storyboard count (markdown files under prototype/storyboards/).
